one_time_description: Nation amenity contribution (community amenity contribution) from development partner for Kitsilano IR6 reserve development - first phase commenced
economic_notes: Nation established an investment fund of $91,689,386 from non-recurring revenue sources. Senakw development (Kitsilano IR6) is a multi-phase mixed-use development with City of Vancouver. Nch'Kay is the Nation's commercial development arm. MST Development Corporation is a joint venture with Musqueam Indian Band and Tsleil-Waututh Nation. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative funded 80 units of affordable modular housing for Nation members.
notes: Large one-time Nation amenity contribution of $57.8M from Kitsilano IR6 (Senakw) development agreement. Capital contribution of $29.6M released from CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative deferred contributions into revenue. Deferred capital contributions balance reduced to $0 from $28.7M. Complex consolidation: 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries including Nch'Kay Development LP, Hiyam Housing Society, and proportionate consolidation of Spo7ez (50%) and MST Development Corp (33%). 11 government business enterprises/partnerships accounted for under modified equity method including multiple Senakw partnerships. Net equity loss from GBPs of $5.1M recorded as expense. ISC funding not separately identified - government transfer of $45.4M includes federal and provincial sources. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Program expense breakdown not available in segment schedule from extracted text. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 so fiscal_year is 2023.
